chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.No.S-341 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.07.2021 Mr. Shaharyar Shar, Advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Jahanzeb Leghari, Advocate for respondents No.5 to 9. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G a/w SIP Nasrullah SHO P.S Kadhan and Inspector Zafar Hussain (Focal Person) Badin. == The alleged detenue Tekam Das is produced by SHO P.S Badin. He appears to be a well built and intelligent person. It is stated by him that he by taking new name as Tanveer Ahmed has embraced Islam by his choice without any coercion and compulsion from any corner; he is under no wrongful confinement and being free person is passing his life independently and does not want to join his mother, the petitioner. His statement to that effect is recorded by police, it is taken on record. The circumstances prima facie suggests that no case for wrongful or illegal confinement/detention of the alleged detenue is apparent, which may justify this Court to make interference with it, in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction by way of instant petition; it is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Shahid
